result_block:
## Result
- **Brick**: diagram
- **Mode**: native
- **Mini-task**: Generate a Mermaid flowchart of inter-package @nestjs/* peerDependency relationships in test-repo/packages/
- **Answer**:

Sorted edges:
```
core --> common
core --> microservices
core --> platform-express
core --> websockets
microservices --> common
microservices --> core
microservices --> websockets
platform-express --> common
platform-express --> core
platform-fastify --> common
platform-fastify --> core
platform-socket.io --> common
platform-socket.io --> websockets
platform-ws --> common
platform-ws --> websockets
testing --> common
testing --> core
testing --> microservices
testing --> platform-express
websockets --> common
websockets --> core
websockets --> platform-socket.io
```

Mermaid diagram:
````mermaid
flowchart LR
    common["common"]
    core["core"]
    microservices["microservices"]
    platform_express["platform-express"]
    platform_fastify["platform-fastify"]
    platform_socket_io["platform-socket.io"]
    platform_ws["platform-ws"]
    testing["testing"]
    websockets["websockets"]

    core --> common
    core --> microservices
    core --> platform_express
    core --> websockets
    microservices --> common
    microservices --> core
    microservices --> websockets
    platform_express --> common
    platform_express --> core
    platform_fastify --> common
    platform_fastify --> core
    platform_socket_io --> common
    platform_socket_io --> websockets
    platform_ws --> common
    platform_ws --> websockets
    testing --> common
    testing --> core
    testing --> microservices
    testing --> platform_express
    websockets --> common
    websockets --> core
    websockets --> platform_socket_io
````

- **Turns used**: 10
- **Tools used**: Read, Bash, Glob (Bash only for filesystem/python work; Read for mcp-brick.json)
- **Rough token estimate**: ~3,500
- **Notes**: All 9 packages use only `peerDependencies` for `@nestjs/*` cross-package references (no `dependencies`). The `common` package has zero `@nestjs/*` deps (it is the root leaf). This task maps cleanly to the `mermaid` tool in brick mode — the brick would receive a structured nodes/edges payload and emit the diagram text automatically.
mini_task_spec:
Examine the `peerDependencies` field of the `package.json` file in each of the nine NestJS packages located under `test-repo/packages/` (the subdirectories are: `common`, `core`, `microservices`, `platform-express`, `platform-fastify`, `platform-socket.io`, `platform-ws`, `testing`, `websockets`). Collect every dependency entry whose name starts with `@nestjs/` and whose target package is also one of those nine packages. Using this dependency data, generate a **Mermaid `flowchart LR` diagram** where:
- Each of the nine packages is a node, using the short name (without the `@nestjs/` prefix) as both the node ID (with `-` and `.` replaced by `_`) and the displayed label.
- Each directed edge points **from** the package that declares the dependency **to** the package it depends on.

Report the **sorted list of edges** (one per line, format: `source --> target`, sorted lexicographically) and the complete **Mermaid diagram source code** (as a fenced `mermaid` block).
